title: Display device and displaying method
abstract: A display device is disclosed. The display device includes a display including a backlight comprising a plurality of light sources and a display panel and configured to display a background image including a preset object, a sensor disposed at an outer part of the display and configured to sense an external lighting environment and a processor configured to determine a direction of a lighting based on the sensed lighting environment, to display a shadow object for the preset object at a position corresponding to the determined lighting direction, and to adjust a brightness of a light source corresponding to a position of the shadow object from among the plurality of light sources based on the sensed lighting environment.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) A display device comprising: a display including a backlight comprising a plurality of light sources and a display panel, and configured to display a background image including a preset object; a sensor disposed at an outer part of the display and configured to sense an external lighting environment; and a processor configured to determine a direction of a lighting based on the sensed lighting environment, to display a shadow object for the preset object at a position corresponding to the determined lighting direction, and to adjust a brightness of a light source corresponding to a position of the shadow object from among the plurality of light sources based on the sensed lighting environment. The display device as claimed in claim 1, wherein the processor is configured to control the backlight so that a brightness of a light source corresponding to the position of the shadow object from among the plurality of light sources is darker than a brightness of other light sources. The display device as claimed in claim 2, wherein the processor is configured to determine a dimming value for each of the plurality of light sources based on the external lighting environment of the display device and the position of the shadow object, and to provide the determined dimming value to each of the plurality of light sources. The display device as claimed in claim 1, wherein the processor is configured to determine a size of the shadow object further based on an illumination value and a color temperature. The display device as claimed in claim 3, wherein the processor is configured to determine a diming value for each of the plurality of light sources further based on a color temperature. The display device as claimed in claim 1, wherein the plurality of light sources are arranged in a matrix form. The display device as claimed in claim 1, wherein the sensor comprises a plurality of illumination sensors disposed at a plurality of positions placed apart from each other on the display device. The display device as claimed in claim 7, wherein the plurality of illumination sensors comprise: a first illumination sensor disposed at an upper left side of the display device; and a second illumination sensor disposed at an upper right side of the display device. A displaying method comprising: displaying a background image including a preset object using a plurality of light sources; sensing an external lighting environment; determining a direction of a lighting based on the sensed lighting environment, displaying a shadow object for the preset object at a position corresponding to the determined lighting direction, and adjusting a brightness of a light source corresponding to the position of the shadow object from among the plurality of light sources based on the sensed lighting environment. The method as claimed in claim 9, wherein the adjusting comprises controlling the plurality of light sources so brightness of a light source corresponding to the position of the shadow object from among the plurality of light sources is darker than brightness of other light sources. The method as claimed in claim 10, wherein the adjusting comprises determining a dimming value for each of the plurality of light sources based on the position of the external lighting environment of the display device and the position of the shadow object, and providing the determined dimming value to each of the plurality of light sources. The method as claimed in claim 10, wherein the adjusting comprises determining a dimming value for each of the plurality of light sources further based on a color temperature. The method as claimed in claim 9, wherein the adjusting comprises determining a size of the shadow object further based on an illumination value and a color temperature, and displaying the shadow object of the determined size at a determined position. The method as claimed in claim 9, wherein the sensing comprises sensing a lighting environment using a plurality of illumination sensors arranged at a plurality of positions placed apart from each other at an outer part of the display device. The method as claimed in claim 14, wherein the sensing comprises sensing one or more of an illumination, a light intensity and a color temperature at at least one position from among the plurality of positions.
